## PR Guide

Follow the canonical guide before requesting review:

- [Pull Request Guide](https://github.com/robert7/remnote-mcp-bridge/blob/main/docs/guides/pull-request-guide.md)

## Linked PRs

*Link related PRs in MCP server/CLI when protocol or feature parity is affected.*

## Required Checklist

- [ ] updated all relevant documentation.
- [ ] updated or added tests for the changed behavior.
- [ ] extended and ran integration tests
- [ ] updated `CHANGELOG.md`.
- [ ] if the shared protocol or consumer-visible behavior changed: opened or updated PRs in all relevant repos to keep MCP server/CLI parity.
